title: Operation Yashima full video
wikitext:
[]: "Operation Yashima" full video Post by V » Sun Dec 30, 2007 11:18 am "Quit your grinnin' an' drop your linen!" -- Pvt. Hudson, Aliens http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3y1yQvGB_cM Rebuild-Ramiel in all its shapeshifting-prism glory

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Dec 30, 2007 11:46 am I'd like to know just what they're saying and what those text displays say. Edit: And just in case you didn't notice, there's a pair of links to the second half of the movie...I'm too lazy to point out which thread it's on, though.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 30, 2007 11:52 am Or there's the higher-resolution version in that other thread. Or, like Reichu, we could wait until it comes out on DVD.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Dec 30, 2007 11:54 am That, NAW, could be a long, long wait. :(

[]: Post by V » Sun Dec 30, 2007 12:03 pm yeah but it spreads faster on YouTube

[]: Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Dec 30, 2007 12:04 pm Where's this guy get this? It's really good quality UrsusArctos wrote: Edit: And just in case you didn't notice, there's a pair of links to the second half of the movie...I'm too lazy to point out which thread it's on, though.

[]: Post by V » Sun Dec 30, 2007 12:07 pm Indigo Arcangel wrote: Where's this guy get this? It's really good quality UrsusArctos wrote: Edit: And just in case you didn't notice, there's a pair of links to the second half of the movie...I'm too lazy to point out which thread it's on, though.

[]: Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Dec 30, 2007 12:24 pm Ta very much. Me so happy. Imagine this emoticon with a smile :cry: From the way that everything is coreographed, from the scenes to the expressions, it seems that they're going for a much more serious approach this time around, which is definately fine by me.

[]: Post by EvaCub » Sun Dec 30, 2007 6:40 pm I like the quality too REBUILDSPOILER: Is it just me or is Ramiel numbered incorrectly as the 6th angel instead of the 5th? Does that mean that the big white giant in terminal dogma and/or the white giant on the moon (lilithmask) is a new angel that got added?

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 30, 2007 7:46 pm HOLY SHIT! :shock: That freaking RULED. ^__^ IMO, the CGI was done quite nice. (And now at least I can see just what's meant by the audio quality from that mp3 sucking.) @ Ornette: So was this a shitty camrip or the real deal? The quality seems decent, despite looking somewhat dark, from what I can see. And thank God, Ogata Megumi's still got it.

[]: Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sun Dec 30, 2007 7:55 pm I saw that ages ago, it was pretty good considering the fact that he implemented CGI.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 30, 2007 8:07 pm EvaCub wrote: Is it just me or is Ramiel numbered incorrectly as the 6th angel instead of the 5th? Does that mean that the big white giant in terminal dogma and/or the white giant on the moon (lilithmask) is a new angel that got added?

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 30, 2007 8:14 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: HOLY SHIT! :shock: That freaking RULED. ^__^

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 30, 2007 8:27 pm Shifting camrip chatter here.
